primary_composite.source: PMID:25552772 (Pfeffer Circulation 2015, Table 2: Americas HR 0.82, 95% CI 0.69-0.98)

acm.source: PMID:25552772 (Pfeffer Circulation 2015, Table 3: Americas ACM HR 0.83, 95% CI 0.68-1.01)

cv_death.source: PMID:25552772 (Pfeffer Circulation 2015, Table 3: Americas CV death HR 0.88, 95% CI 0.71-1.10)

non_cv_death.source: Derived from ACM conservation (ACM=0.83; CV fraction=0.60; non-CV HR approx 0.755; CI approximate)

hf_hosp.source: PMID:25552772 (Pfeffer Circulation 2015, Table 3: Americas HF hosp HR 0.82, 95% CI 0.66-1.01)

delta_k.source: Derived (assumption: typical MRA effect +0.2 mmol/L; no Americas-specific subgroup table available in PMID:25552772)

delta_sbp.source: Derived (assumption: modest SBP reduction in HFpEF population; no Americas-specific value in PMID:25552772)

delta_egfr.source: Derived (assumption: modest acute eGFR dip with MRA in HFpEF; no Americas-specific value in PMID:25552772)
